enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual vlog update about his Sunday: he worked late into the night, drank four beers which made him feel sick, and briefly outlines his plans for the day including a cleaning job and a task at his mom's house.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: four beers was too many given his liver isn't in good shape
proud of grinding late into the night despite getting sick
